name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Better organisation of media grabbed from the debrid service: a file named only S01E05.mkv inside a torrent now takes its show title from the torrent name, so streams and downloads land in the correct Show/Season paths and mirror each other. Files that still cannot be identified are left in a flat folder rather than guessed into Movies or Shows.
